briefings.headline: CORN RALLIES 9¢ ON PLANTING UNCERTAINTY
briefings.teaser: Corn's biggest overnight move in weeks has traders asking if spring planting delays are already baked in.

briefings.headline: CATTLE SURGE OVERNIGHT, GRAINS DRIFT LOWER
briefings.teaser: Cattle rally sparks feed cost questions while grain markets search for direction.

briefings.headline: CRUDE RALLIES 3% AS GRAINS DRIFT SIDEWAYS
briefings.teaser: Energy costs surge while grains stay flat — what's really driving markets before planting season?
